concepts.title: Hasse bound and the Frobenius angle
concepts.blurb: For E/Q with good reduction at p, write a_p = 2√p · cos θ_p with θ_p ∈ [0, π]. The Frobenius eigenvalues are e^{±iθ_p}√p on the unit circle (after rescaling).

concepts.title: The Sato–Tate measure
concepts.blurb: For non-CM E, the angles θ_p equidistribute on [0, π] with respect to the semicircular density (2/π) sin²θ dθ.

concepts.title: Symmetric-power L-functions
concepts.blurb: Sato–Tate is equivalent to non-vanishing and holomorphy of L(Sym^n E, s) on Re(s) ≥ 1 for every n ≥ 1.
